summary: Restaurant ordering app where customers can browse menu, select items with quantities, checkout with info and tip. Admin panel (PIN: 8914) for management. Currently removing public delete functionality for products.
architectural_notes: Admin-only operations (like product deletion) require PIN authentication (8914)
Public users can browse menu, select quantities, and checkout but cannot modify product data

existing_features.title: Remove the delete button and delete functionality from the ProductCard component so public users cannot delete products from the catalog view

new_feature_requests.summary: Remove product deletion capability from public-facing interface
Remove the delete button and delete functionality from the ProductDetail page so public users cannot delete products from the detail view
